meaning: n.虫漆vt.涂上虫漆,以虫胶结合,<美俚>殴打
examples: Shellac also happened to be an effective electrical insulator.
Once that happens, and it almost always does, the insect simply becomes part of the shellac-making process.
Residency training, with its harsh hours and unrelenting pace, added several more layers of protective shellac.
Shellac is also the name of a rock band from Chicago.
Spillers claims to be the oldest record shop in the world, tracing its history back 105 years, when it originally sold phonograph players and shellac records.
